mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, component, redirect, icon, title, sort_order, show_link, keep_alive, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, component, redirect, icon, title, sort_order, show_link, keep_alive, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM menu WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.redirect, m.icon, m.title, m.sort_order, m.show_link, m.keep_alive, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at, m.is_deleted FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC

-- 查询直接关联的菜单 SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.redirect, m.icon, m.title, m.sort_order, m.show_link, m.keep_alive, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at, m.is_deleted FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN role r ON rm.role_id = r.id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1
UNION ALL
-- 查询已关联父菜单的所有子菜单 -- 优化：先获取已关联的父菜单ID，再查询子菜单，避免自连接 SELECT child.id, child.parent_id, child.name, child.path, child.component, child.redirect, child.icon, child.title, child.sort_order, child.show_link, child.keep_alive, child.status, child.created_at, child.updated_at, child.is_deleted FROM menu child INNER JOIN ( -- 子查询：获取已关联的父菜单ID SELECT DISTINCT rm.menu_id FROM role_menu rm INNER JOIN role r ON rm.role_id = r.id WHERE r.code = #{roleCode} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 ) parent_menus ON child.parent_id = parent_menus.menu_id WHERE child.is_deleted = 0 AND child.status = 1
-- 注意：去重在应用层（Java代码）完成，不使用 DISTINCT 以提高性能
